tips_en: Start with the TSR paper (LLATISA) because its hierarchical cognitive taxonomy, large HITSR dataset and dual‑view VLM approach provide a solid foundation for evaluating and building time‑series reasoning capabilities; its CoT‑aware curriculum also demonstrates how structured reasoning improves generalization, which connects to the explicit control‑flow ideas in AgentSPEX. After that, AgentSPEX offers a declarative workflow language for orchestrating multi‑step agent pipelines, making it a natural follow‑up if you are interested in LLM‑agent design. The DiffNR paper on sparse‑view CT reconstruction is more specialized and can be read later, as its diffusion‑based repair‑and‑augment strategy is largely independent of the reasoning and orchestration topics.
tips_zh: 先阅读TSR论文（LLATISA），因为它提出了层次化的认知分类法、大规模HITSR数据集以及双视图VLM方法，为时间序列推理提供了坚实的评估和构建基础；其CoT感知课程训练也展示了结构化推理如何提升泛化能力，这与AgentSPEX的显式控制流理念相呼应。之后，AgentSPEX提供了一种声明式工作流语言，可用于编排多步代理流程，适合作为后续阅读如果你关注LLM代理设计。DiffNR关于稀疏视角CT重建的论文更为专精，其基于扩散的修复‑增强策略与前两篇的推理和编排主题关联较少，可稍后阅读。
